title: LLB Jobs 2026 – Assistant District Attorney
shortInfo: The Haryana Public Service Commission (HPSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 255 Assistant District Attorney. Candidates with LLB Can Apply Online. The online application reopens on 25-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through HPSC website, hpsc.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: HPSC Assistant District Attorney Recruitment 2026 Reopened - Apply Online for 255 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Haryana Public Service Commission (HPSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 255 Assistant District Attorney. Candidates with LLB Can Apply Online. The online application reopens on 25-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through HPSC website, hpsc.gov.in.

application_fee.details: Selection will be made strictly as per the relevant Service Rules through a multi-stage process:

age_limit.details: Minimum: 21 years Maximum: 42 years Age relaxation applicable as per Haryana Government rules (5 years for SC/BC, PwBD, etc. — upper age limit generally 52 years in some cases).

qualification.details: Educational Qualification (as on closing date): Degree of Bachelor of Laws (Professional) from a recognized University. Hindi / Sanskrit upto Matric or Higher Standard. Enrolled as an Advocate with Bar Council. Age Limit (as on 02.09.2025): Minimum: 21 years Maximum: 42 years Age relaxation applicable as per Haryana Government rules (5 years for SC/BC, PwBD, etc. — upper age limit generally 52 years in some cases). Nationality: Indian Citizen (or specified categories with eligibility certificate).

how_to_apply: Candidates can register using their Mobile Number & Aadhaar Number. If Aadhaar data is not updated, register using Mobile Number.
After successful registration, a Login ID will be created.
Login and fill the online application form carefully with all required details.
Upload scanned copies of all necessary documents.
Pay the requisite application fee online (Net Banking / Debit Card / Credit Card).
After payment, download the application form, check all details, sign it, and upload the signed copy.
Take a printout of the finally submitted application form for future reference.
important_instructions: This is a Group-B Gazetted post in the Prosecution Department, Haryana.
Candidates should carefully read the full advertisement before applying.
No change in any particular (including category) is allowed after final submission of the application.
Only one application should be submitted. In case of multiple applications, only the latest application with the highest Application Number will be considered.
Mere issuance of admit card does not confer any right to the candidate.
All candidates must fulfill the essential qualifications and other conditions as on the closing date (originally 02.09.2025).
No certificate/document issued after the closing date will be accepted.
Candidates are advised to keep their registered email ID and mobile number active till the completion of the recruitment process.
Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.
The decision of the Haryana Public Service Commission shall be final.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for HPSC Assistant District Attorney Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The reopened online application window for HPSC ADA Recruitment 2026 is from 25 May 2026 to 29 May 2026 up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: How many vacancies are there in HPSC ADA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 255 vacancies for Assistant District Attorney (Group-B) posts in the Prosecution Department, Haryana under Advertisement No. 18 of 2025.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for HPSC Assistant District Attorney 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor of Laws (LLB Professional) degree from a recognized university, be enrolled as an Advocate with the Bar Council, and have Hindi/Sanskrit up to Matric or higher standard.

faq.question: What is the age limit for HPSC ADA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 21 years and the maximum age is 42 years as per the original closing date 02 September 2025, with relaxations for reserved categories as per Haryana Government rules.

faq.question: What is the selection process for HPSC Assistant District Attorney 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Screening Test, Subject Knowledge Test, and Interview, with final merit prepared based on marks in the Subject Knowledge Test and Interview only.

faq.question: What is the salary of an HPSC Assistant District Attorney in Haryana?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive salary in Functional Pay Level-9, Rs. 53,100 to Rs. 1,67,800 as per Haryana Government pay rules.

faq.question: Do candidates who applied earlier need to apply again for HPSC ADA 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates who already applied under Advt. No. 18 of 2025 need not apply again unless they want to update their details; fresh candidates can apply in the reopened window.

faq.question: What is the application fee for HPSC ADA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Application fees are Rs. 1000 for General/other state candidates, Rs. 250 for certain reserved categories and women of Haryana, and NIL for eligible PwBD candidates of Haryana.

seo_tags: Haryana Public Service Commission Assistant District Attorney Recruitment 2026
